creator: samy.mahmoudi@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 195491
Adds UseBlacklist to the sshdconfigKeyword syntax group

Support for blacklistd has been added to OpenSSH since FreeBSD 11.1-RELEASE. However, syntax/sshdconfig.vim has not been updated accordingly, so that the new keyword UseBlacklist is not highlighted.

The attached patch adds UseBlacklist to the sshdconfigKeyword syntax group. Adding this upstream seems BSD-centrism but I may give it a try.
